positive: A whimsical and stylized forest scene, featuring diverse silhouettes of woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls) interacting playfully under a bioluminescent, stylized canopy. The style should be highly graphic and illustrative, resembling modern children's book etching mixed with vibrant stained glass elements. Use a restricted palette of deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be centrally focused, suitable for seamless tiling or as a strong, contrasting chest print. Ensure clean linework, solid color blocks, and high contrast between the dark forest background and the glowing subjects. Vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, low detail, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, noise, photorealistic, gradients, muted colors, out of frame
